segments.original_text: 久しぶりに撃墜したー!

segments.text: The timing on this is incredibly tight though
segments.original_text: これかなりタイミングシビアなんですけれどもね

segments.text: He's going all in for the KO!
segments.original_text: ゴールドしてるから撃墜する!

full_text: Finally got that KO! The timing on this is incredibly tight though He's landing everything! Nice! He's going all in for the KO!

corrections.rule: kanji homophone: 撃沈→撃墜 (smash term)
